debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
inst✝ : Fintype V
G : SimpleGraph V
d : ℕ
hGcolorable : G.Colorable 2
hGdeg : ∀ (s : Finset V), (induce (↑s) G).edgeFinset.card ≤ d * s.card
⊢ ∃ r, Irreflexive r ∧ IsAsymm V r

failed_attempts:
by
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := hGcolorable
  use fun x y => G.Adj x y ∧ f x = 0 ∧ f y = 1
  constructor
  · intro x h
    simp_all [SimpleGraph.Adj]
  · intro x y h
    simp_all [SimpleGraph.Adj, Ne.symm]

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := hGcolorable
  have hC' : C = 2 := rfl
  simp only [hC'] at hC
  use fun x y => G.Adj x y ∧ C x ≠ C y ∧ C x = 0
  constructor
  · intro x hx
    simp_all [SimpleGraph.Adj]
  · intro x y hxy hyx
    simp_all [SimpleGraph.Adj, Ne, eq_comm]

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := hGcolorable
  have hC' : ∀ v w, G.Adj v w → C v ≠ C w := by
    intro v w hvw
    exact hC hvw
  let r : V → V → Prop := fun v w ↦ G.Adj v w ∧ C v = 0 ∧ C w = 1
  refine' ⟨r, _, _⟩
  · intro v hv
    simp only [r, and_imp] at hv
    obtain ⟨hv₁, hv₂, hv₃⟩ := hv
    have := hC' v v hv₁
    simp_all
  · intro v w hvw h'vw
    simp only [r, and_imp] at hvw h'vw
    obtain ⟨hv₁, hv₂, hv₃⟩ := hvw
    obtain ⟨hw₁, hw₂, hw₃⟩ := h'vw
    have := hC' v w hv₁
    simp_all

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := hGcolorable
  have hC' : C.Injective := hC.injective
  let A := {v : V | C v = 0}
  let B := {v : V | C v = 1}
  have hAB : A ∪ B = Set.univ := by
    ext v
    simp only [Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    have := hC'.ne_iff.2 (by decide : (0 : Fin 2) ≠ 1)
    omega
  have hAB' : A ∩ B = ∅ := by
    ext v
    simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    intro h
    exact (hC'.ne_iff.2 (by decide : (0 : Fin 2) ≠ 1)) h.1.symm ▸ h.2
  refine' ⟨fun u v => G.Adj u v ∧ u ∈ A ∧ v ∈ B, _, _⟩
  · intro v
    simp
  · intro u v h
    simp_all only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, and_imp, not_and_or, not_true, or_false]
    intro h'
    have huv : C u ≠ C v := by
      apply hC'.ne
      exact h.1
    simp_all
